title: FFT Tracer
description: A live spectrum analyser and spectrogram off the microphone. The top traces the FFT magnitude spectrum as a glowing filled curve with falling peak-hold caps; the bottom is a scrolling waterfall spectrogram, each new row the current spectrum coloured by loudness and drifting down so you read time as it falls. Log-frequency axis, resolution, gain, smoothing, mirror, and hue are live. Click the mic to trace live audio — it idles on a synthetic spectrum until you do.
